name: Orlandi Valuta
description_short: Orlandi Valuta operates a check-cashing service in Colorado Springs offering extended daily hours for financial transactions.
description_long:
Orlandi Valuta is a check-cashing business located at Best Checks Cashed, 3849 E Pikes Peak Ave in Colorado Springs, Colorado 80909. The company operates as a retail financial services provider serving the Colorado Springs area and is listed under money transfer and check-cashing business categories.

The business offers check-cashing services as its primary offering. Based on the Chamber of Commerce listing and associated business directory information, Orlandi Valuta appears to provide financial transaction services typical of check-cashing establishments, though specific service details beyond check-cashing are not extensively documented in the available source material.

Orlandi Valuta distinguishes itself through extended operating hours, remaining open from 8:00 AM to 9:00 PM seven days a week, including weekends. This schedule provides convenient access for customers who may need check-cashing services outside standard business hours. The company operates from a dedicated storefront location with a direct phone line for customer inquiries.

The business currently has no customer reviews on the Chamber of Commerce platform, making it difficult to assess service quality or customer satisfaction from public feedback. Limited information is available beyond basic operational details, and the company's specific fee structures, service breadth, and customer testimonials are not documented in accessible sources. Prospective customers should contact the business directly for current pricing and service details.

pros: Extended hours: Open 8:00 AM - 9:00 PM every day of the week, including weekends
Convenient location: Established storefront at 3849 E Pikes Peak Ave in Colorado Springs
Direct phone contact: Reachable at 719-596-7095 for pricing and service questions
Seven-day operation: Available for check-cashing services on Sundays when many competitors are closed
Listed business: Registered with Chamber of Commerce for transparency and legitimacy
cons: No customer reviews: Zero reviews on Chamber of Commerce despite listing, making service quality unverified
Limited service documentation: Specific fees, check limits, and accepted check types not publicly disclosed
Minimal online presence: Limited information beyond basic directory listing; no detailed website content available
Unclear service scope: Beyond check-cashing, specific additional services are not documented in available sources
best_for: Colorado Springs residents needing weekend or evening check-cashing services
Customers seeking extended-hour financial transaction access
Local shoppers looking for in-person check-cashing alternatives to banks
diagnosis: Orlandi Valuta is best for Colorado Springs residents who need check-cashing services during extended evening and weekend hours when traditional banks are closed. The main caveat is the complete absence of customer reviews and limited publicly available information about specific fees, service terms, and service quality—prospective customers should call ahead to confirm current services and pricing before visiting.
